---
format-links: false
format:
  pptx:
    slide-level: 2
---

## Cross-City Urban Heat Hotspot Prediction

![](build/slide_01_title_card.png){width=100%}

## Why Transfer Matters

![](build/slide_02_problem_framing.png){width=100%}

## Data + Evaluation Design

![](build/slide_03_design.png){width=100%}

## Models + Main Result

![](build/slide_04_models_results.png){width=100%}

## Held-Out Denver

![](build/slide_05_denver_example.png){width=100%}

## Takeaway

![](build/slide_06_takeaway.png){width=100%}
